TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live UEFA Europa League
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Live: UEFA Europa League Final
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: SC Freiburg v Aston Villa (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the final, which takes place at Besiktas Stadium in Istanbul, Turkiye. After coming out on top in an all-English semi-final when they beat Nottingham Forest 4-1, Villa go in search of their first silverware since winning the Coca-Cola Cup in 1995/96, and a first European trophy since lifting the 1981/82 European Cup. Standing in their way is a Bundesliga club that has never won a major trophy and are appearing in a cup final of any description for just the second time in their history, after previously losing the 2021/22 DFB Pokal final to RB Leipzig on a penalty shootout.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Award-winning program anchored by David Muir, featuring unforgettable, character-driven true crime mysteries, exclusive newsmaker interviews, hard-hitting investigative reports and in-depth coverage of high profile stories.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.subtitle: Tracking Susana
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: When a 16-year-old girl vanishes, her family investigates her disappearance; TV cameras capture the moment police discover a clue that breaks the case wide open and changes everything.

HBO.East.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.East.us2.description: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

HBO.East.us2.title: Insidious: The Last Key
HBO.East.us2.description: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

HBO.East.us2.title: Insidious: The Red Door
HBO.East.us2.description: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

HBO.East.us2.title: Dune
HBO.East.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.East.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
HBO.East.us2.description: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.East.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.East.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.East.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.East.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.East.us2.title: Paddington 2
HBO.East.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.East.us2.title: Twister
HBO.East.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick

When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2

One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Hal cannot believe it when Ginny Ryerson (Anna Kendrick), a pretty classmate, asks him to join their school's debate team. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic-actor dishes on the futile art of impressing teenagers, attending a "Magic Mike Live" show with her grandmother, and the alarming reactions that she and her husband had to the unwanted presence of an intruder.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Dan Soder: Son of a Gary
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a performance from The Bowery Ballroom in New York City, the comic discusses topics including drug dogs at the airport, the customer service generation, fake fights in the shower, and what it's like to have an alcoholic but fun dad.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy Rich Asians
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Hidden Figures
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dear Ms.: A Revolution in Print
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A deep dive into the storied and complex legacy of "Ms." magazine through the lens of some of its covers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Stevie Van Zandt: Disciple
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Stevie Van Zandt, known as New Jersey ́s most famous consigliere to Bruce Springsteen and Tony Soprano, takes center stage in this feature documentary. Featuring a wealth of never before seen footage, the film traces Van Zandt ́s career as a producer, musician, songwriter, activist, actor, and more, from the clubs of Asbury Park, N.J. to arenas and stadiums, to the Bada Bing Club and the Underground Garage.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Brutalist
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lighthouse
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Greenland
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Greenland 2: Migration
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Smoking Tigers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Batman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alive Day Memories: Home From Iraq
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ten soldiers who suffered traumatic injuries during the Iraq war discuss their experiences with actor James Gandolfini.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Escape From Kabul
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Examining 18 days in August 2021, from the U.S. withdrawal of its troops from Afghanistan through the subsequent evacuation of tens of thousands of Afghan citizens from Kabul airport after the Taliban seized the city.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Prime Minister
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicling Jacinda Ardern's unexpected journey as New Zealand's 40th Prime Minister, this documentary offers an unfiltered window into her years in power.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Logan
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Shape of Water
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Warfare
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Meg 2: The Trench
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Making the Cut
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Hot Headed
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Vying for a spot in the U.S. Open finals, Anthony "Simo" Simonsen and Australia's Jason "Belmo" Belmonte face off as tempers escalate and injuries flare.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Who Do You Think You Are?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At the Pete Weber Classic in Springfield, Missouri, named after one of the sports greats, bowler extraordinaire EJ Tackett must fend off Belmo and Simo to reclaim the top prize.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Real Kingpin
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: 200 bowlers from 18 different countries descend upon Reno, Nevada to compete in the month-long World Series of Bowling.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Tournament of Champions
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: How We Get Free
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Over the course of two years, Elisabeth Epps works to end cash bail on all fronts, from bailing people out of jail to running for office as one of the first abolitionist candidates in Colorado.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Finding the Way Home
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The stories of eight children who have been reunited with family members or placed in loving foster homes after being exposed to the distressing conditions prevalent in orphanages and institutions around the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Stopping The Steal
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An inside account of President Trump's challenge to the results of the 2020 presidential election as told by former White House staff and appointees.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: NuNet insta a Valerie a hacer una declaración pública en defensa de la IA. Valerie reflexiona sobre su futuro, con o sin How's That?!

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Después de una crisis nerviosa, Niall se entera de que Rubén ha regresado. La obsesión se apodera de él y un tenso enfrentamiento obliga a los hermanos a confrontar su pasado conflictivo.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Insidious: The Last Key
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una prestigiosa parapsicóloga y su equipo se desplazan a Nuevo México para investigar los fenómenos que ocurren en la casa en la que ella creció. Allá, ella deberá enfrentarse a su mayor miedo: el demonio que sin querer liberó en el pasado.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Insidious: The Red Door
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Nueve años después, Josh y Renai se han divorciado, Lorraine ha fallecido y Dalton ha ingresado en la universidad. Allí, los demonios del pasado resurgen para atormentarlo mientras, al mismo tiempo, Josh empieza a tener visiones de su padre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Duna
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, un joven brillante y talentoso nacido para un destino extraordinario, debe viajar al planeta más peligroso del universo para garantizar el futuro de su familia y su pueblo. Pero cuando fuerzas malintencionadas se ven envueltas en un conflicto por el control de la materia prima más valiosa del planeta, una sustancia capaz de liberar todo el potencial de la humanidad, solo quienes superen sus miedos sobrevivirán.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Gente de Zona: En letra de otro
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una presentación en vivo desde La Habana, Cuba. Además, Alexander y Randy repasan anécdotas, visitan sus antiguos barrios y cuentan historias inspiradas en las canciones que han seleccionado para interpretar.

NBC.East.Stream.us2.title: Open House
NBC.East.Stream.us2.description: Buying a house can be a stressful, time-consuming process, which is why people turn to shows such as "Open House" to get help in the real estate market. Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Inferno
CNN.HD.us2.description: On April 26, 1986, a massive explosion rips through a reactor during a safety test at a power plant in Ukraine, triggering the worst nuclear accident in history; within 24 hours, a lethal radioactive cloud starts to circle the globe.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Cover Up
CNN.HD.us2.description: The day after the incident, helicopter crews brave deadly radioactive smoke to extinguish the fire raging in the reactor core. As 50,000 locals evacuate, Soviet authorities try to conceal the scale and human cost of the accident.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Sacrifice
CNN.HD.us2.description: In the weeks following the meltdown, workers battle lethal radiation to clear debris and construct a protective tomb around the destroyed reactor. Amid speculation, Soviet scientists reveal what they can about the cause of the catastrophe.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Fallout
CNN.HD.us2.description: As the USSR collapses, an investigation uncovers the cause of the accident and scale of the Soviet cover up. Today, Chernobyl's toxic legacy persists as the nuclear exclusion zone becomes a war zone, raising fears of another disaster.

Though she's come into her full powers, she maintains a low profile by curating ancient artifacts, and only performing heroic acts incognito. But soon, Diana will have to muster all of her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah, a villainess who possesses superhuman strength and agility.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Dune
truTV.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Jurassic Park
truTV.HD.us2.description: In Steven Spielberg's massive blockbuster, paleontologists Alan Grant (Sam Neill) and Ellie Sattler (Laura Dern) and mathematician Ian Malcolm (Jeff Goldblum) are among a select group chosen to tour an island theme park populated by dinosaurs created from prehistoric DNA. While the park's mastermind, billionaire John Hammond (Richard Attenborough), assures everyone that the facility is safe, they find out otherwise when various ferocious predators break free and go on the hunt.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Joker
truTV.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

After Sonny accepts a deal with Seattle that nets him that team's first-round pick, he immediately wonders if he has made the right choice for himself and the Browns.

Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Deep Impact

The U.S. government keeps the crisis under wraps, but crack reporter Jenny Lerner (Tea Leoni) uncovers the truth -- forcing U.S. President Beck (Morgan Freeman) to announce his plan. Grizzled astronaut Spurgeon "Fish" Tanner (Robert Duvall) and his team will land on the comet and lay explosives, hopefully deterring the object from its doomsday course. If not, humanity will have to prepare for the worst.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1

Her home, District 12, has been reduced to rubble, and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) is now the brainwashed captive of President Snow (Donald Sutherland). At the same time, Katniss also learns about a secret rebellion spreading throughout all of Panem -- a rebellion that will place her at the center of a plot to turn the tables on Snow.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2

Together, they leave District 13 to liberate the citizens of war-torn Panem and assassinate President Snow, who's obsessed with destroying Katniss. What lies ahead are mortal traps, dangerous enemies and moral choices that will ultimately determine the future of millions.

AMC.HD.us2.description: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Unstoppable
AMC.HD.us2.description: When a massive, unmanned locomotive roars out of control, the threat is more ominous than just a derailment. The train is laden with toxic chemicals, and an accident would decimate human life and cause an environmental disaster. The only hope of bringing the train to a safe stop is in the hands of a veteran engineer (Denzel Washington) and a young conductor (Chris Pine), who must risk their lives to save those in the runaway's path. Inspired by true events.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
AMC.HD.us2.description: Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Bourne Supremacy
AMC.HD.us2.description: Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA; Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him -- but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead; vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landry, who is convinced he is guilty.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Escape Plan
AMC.HD.us2.description: Tough and chiseled Ray Breslin (Sylvester Stallone) knows how to infiltrate a prison -- and bust out of one. His latest job leads to a double-cross, leaving him stuck in a high-tech facility with the worst that society has to offer. Luckily for Ray, he meets Emil Rottmayer (Arnold Schwarzenegger), an inmate who secretly helps him hatch a plot to win his freedom. Only sadistic warden Hobbes (Jim Caviezel) stands in the way of the two men successfully making it out alive.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Deepwater Horizon
AMC.HD.us2.description: On April 20, 2010, the Deepwater Horizon drilling rig explodes in the Gulf of Mexico, igniting a massive fireball that kills several crew members. Chief electronics technician Mike Williams (Mark Wahlberg) and his colleagues find themselves fighting for survival as the heat and the flames become stifling and overwhelming. Banding together, the co-workers must use their wits to make it out alive amid all the chaos.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Paid Programming
AMC.HD.us2.description: Paid programming.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Get A Beautiful New Smile in 24 Hours

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Aging Brain
AMC.HD.us2.description: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

AMC.HD.us2.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Mutts to You
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are the operators of a dog laundry who find what they think is an abandoned baby; they learn they are wanted for kidnapping the child.

AMC.HD.us2.title: White House Down
AMC.HD.us2.description: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only Cale can save his daughter, the president and the country.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I Am Legend
AMC.HD.us2.description: Robert Neville, a scientist, is a survivor of a man-made plague that transforms humans into mutants. He wanders alone through New York City, calling out for other possible survivors and works on finding a cure for the plague using his own immune blood. Neville knows he is badly outnumbered and the odds are against him. The infected wait for him to make a mistake that will deliver Neville into their hands.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Book of Eli
AMC.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after war turned the world into a wasteland, a lone warrior named Eli marches across the ruined landscape, carrying hope for humanity's redemption. Only one other man understands the power of what Eli carries, and he is determined to take it for himself. Though Eli prefers peace, he must risk death to protect his precious cargo, to fulfill his destiny to help restore mankind.

Su esposa Carolina lo abandonó y no quiere regresar si no se saca los ojos. En otro caso, Vanessa le regaló su casa a Yenni supuestamente bajo los efectos de una brujería que le invalidaba su voluntad. Ahora quiere anular esa transferencia, pero Yenni alega que la casa ya es suya.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Julia: En mi vida mando yo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julia, una madre divorciada que quiere enamorarse, se reencuentra con Manuel, un hombre controlador y agresivo. La situación la obliga a denunciarlo, no permitirá que nadie más la maltrate.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Premier League: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la información que buscas antes y después de cada jornada en Premier League: análisis previo, datos clave, protagonistas y el mejor repaso tras los partidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Premier League
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la jornada 37 de la temporada regular 2025-26 de la Premier League. Desde el Dean Court. El Bournemouth ganó su último partido contra el Fulham, mientras que el City venció al Crystal Palace.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Genitales en Youtube
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Javier necesita operarse tras ser diagnosticado con cáncer testicular y pide que Zuleika le pague lo que recaudó con un video donde él muestra sus genitales. Ella alega que es pornografía.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pesadillas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Estéfani es una adolescente agobiada por constantes pesadillas. A través de la hipnosis, logra reconstruir su memoria y ahora debe aceptar que la muerte no es algo nuevo para ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le presté dinero y se desapareció
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Manuel ya no sabe qué hacer porque su amigo Miguel le pidió cien mil pesos prestados y desapareció. Ahora acusan a Manuel de ser infiel con Ana, la esposa de Miguel. Llegan dos testigos clave.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A cambio de regalos, se hace de la vista gorda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dylan no soporta que su madre perdone las infidelidades de su padre. Ella tiene un acuerdo con su esposo, le permite tener relaciones con otras mujeres mientras recibe beneficios económicos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A corazón abierto; A los 70 también se termina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela necesita un trasplante de corazón y su hija, con muerte cerebral, puede ser la donante; pero ella está embarazada y su pareja se opone. Anciana exige el divorcio por falta de atención.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niño homofóbico; Dame el dinero, ladrona
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un niño de 12 años encuentra a su padre con otro hombre y empieza a mostrar un comportamiento homofóbico, su madre lo apoya por despecho. Bárbara quiere recuperar el patrimonio de su hermano.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me enamoró para robarme
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Israel perdió la cabeza por Ana y por amor le ofreció casa y trabajo en su negocio. Comienzan las peleas entre ellos y provocan que Ana se quede con la tienda. Israel la acusa de interesada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fuera del negocio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acompañada por Diego, Isabel emprende un viaje a Álamos, pero no saben que al llegar unas cámaras de vigilancia observan sus movimientos. Circe enfrenta cara a cara a su padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Happy Hour; Pequeño campeón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela se defiende cuando la difaman, porque en su empresa hay una habitación para que los empleados tengan sexo. Lorenzo demanda a su madre, por su culpa no pudo ser pelotero profesional.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La cirquera; Un amor haitiano
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariela quiere recuperar la custodia de su hija, pero Criss, el padre de la niña, se niega. Por otro lado, Mabel conoce a un chico haitiano con una historia de vida complicada, él la engaña.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de salvavidas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En este episodio especial, algunos concursantes están a la deriva y buscan ser rescatados.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de egipcio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de gladiadores
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial hindú
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Te llevaré en mi corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Graciela vive amargada por la muerte de su hijo y su hermana trata de ayudarla, pero ella no lo permite.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A cambio de regalos, se hace de la vista gorda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dylan no soporta que su madre perdone las infidelidades de su padre. Ella tiene un acuerdo con su esposo, le permite tener relaciones con otras mujeres mientras recibe beneficios económicos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las tres gracias; El coro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tres mujeres demandan a Jotsy por estafa, él se casó con ellas para luego abandonarlas. También, Ángela quiere que la reintegren en el coro, pero la directora no la acepta de regreso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Churros explosivos; Helados calientes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrea hace churros con la receta de Isabel y le explotan en la cara, pide dinero para gastos médicos. Yuli atiende su heladería en 'body painting', exige que Brenda deje en paz a sus clientes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor a manos llenas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Azucena y Francisco tienen un hijo, pero la madre de ella decide dar al bebé en adopción, ya que son adolescentes. Ya adulta, Azucena regresa llena de amor para recuperarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi héroe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gloria rompe con el padre de su hija y poco después le diagnostican leucemia. Decide entonces casarse con su mejor amigo para que él se haga cargo de su pequeña Elena.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El regalo más bello
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana está feliz porque espera un hijo de Lucio, aunque él está casado. Sus opciones son abortar o dar al bebé en adopción, así que decide entregarlo y estar cerca de él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Silvia: Sin filtros
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Silvia desarrolla dismorfia corporal y su madre quiere resolver el asunto con una cirugía; un consejo la hace reflexionar y la joven inicia el tratamiento psicológico para aceptarse como es.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cinthia: ¿Y si no hay mañana?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cinthia libera su frustración acostándose con alguien diferente cada día, y al sabotear la relación de su madre demostrándole que Mario solo quiere sexo casual, confirma que necesita terapia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fuera del negocio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acompañada por Diego, Isabel emprende un viaje a Álamos, pero no saben que al llegar unas cámaras de vigilancia observan sus movimientos. Circe enfrenta cara a cara a su padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los premios deseados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosa y su hijo Felipe quieren ganarse una cocina integral para un regalo de boda. Evangelina y Nicté llegan con mucho entusiasmo para ganar y duplicar sus premios con el Arca de Noé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuentas pasadas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pedro es un sicario desahuciado que decide volver con la mujer que ama y descubre que tiene una hija, aunque sus deseos de vivir se hacen más fuertes, sus acciones pasadas lo persiguen.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me enamoró para robarme
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Israel perdió la cabeza por Ana y por amor le ofreció casa y trabajo en su negocio. Comienzan las peleas entre ellos y provocan que Ana se quede con la tienda. Israel la acusa de interesada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le puse el cuerno y se desquitó con su hija
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erick separa a Guadalupe de la hija que tienen juntos y la deja en otra ciudad con su abuelo. Asegura que ella es una irresponsable tras descubrir su infidelidad con uno de sus amigos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una molestia ardiente; Lengüetazo viral
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ninoska le repara una pieza dental a Mari que antes le había dado problemas, ahora enfrenta una demanda. Le pasan la lengua a los helados y luego los devuelven, para dañarle el negocio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los no nacidos; Mi abuelo el influencer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sol quiere abrir un cementerio para bebés no nacidos, pero su esposo se niega. Un "influencer" hace un acuerdo con una funeraria para darle promoción; descubren que sus seguidores eran falsos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Él ya no me toca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ale está desesperada por cambiar su apariencia y bajar de peso para atraer sexualmente a su novio. A ella le preocupa que Héctor ya no responde en la intimidad. Él dice que necesita su espacio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro familiar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino asegura que pronto su hija Circe estará fuera del negocio del narcotráfico y visita a los colombianos. Pero no todo es como espera. Isabel y Diego trabajan en equipo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No tengo cara; Patineta mortal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alegnis se arrepintió después de haberse sometido a 10 cirugías estéticas para convertirse en la copia de la exesposa de su marido. Carolina causó un accidente mortal con una patineta.

Fox.Deportes.HD.us2.description: River Plate recibe a Rosario Central en el Estadio Monumental por la semifinal de la Apertura 2026. El duelo revive la semifinal de 2023, donde La Academia Rosarina eliminó al Millonario por la ronda de penales.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Villarreal-Sevilla
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Capdevila + Gemma Mengual
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LALIGA VS es un proyecto de LALIGA y los clubes que tiene el objetivo de erradicar el odio dentro y fuera del fútbol, promoviendo una sociedad respetuosa e inclusiva en todos sus ámbitos. Esta plataforma busca inspirar y sensibilizar a los aficionados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga HyperMotion
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Leganés-Huesca
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la campaña. Una competición de primera.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previo UEFA Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Friburgo-Aston Villa
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Espacio que se emite antes del comienzo de una nueva jornada de la Europa League. En él se repasa la actualidad de los equipos que participan en la competición.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Friburgo-Aston Villa
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Es la segunda competición de la UEFA, pero siempre cuenta con equipos de primer nivel. Tras una fase liga de ocho jornadas, solo los mejores disputarán las eliminatorias por el título. La final de esta edición se disputará en el Besiktas Stadium de Estambul.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Friburgo-Aston Villa
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cultural - Eibar
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: SD Eibar intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Granada - Burgos
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Granada CF buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: Burgos CF intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Castellón - Cádiz
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: CD Castellón buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: Cádiz CF intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Ceuta - Málaga
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: AD Ceuta FC buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: Málaga CF intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Almería - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Duelo de zona alta: el Almería acelerará por dentro y buscará llegar con mucha gente al área, cuidando la transición defensiva. Las Palmas llega con confianza y pretende controlar el ritmo con balón; el que gane las áreas y las segundas jugadas tendrá ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Racing - Valladolid
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Sardinero empuja a un Racing que quiere llevar el partido a campo rival, apretar tras pérdida y sostener su candidatura al ascenso directo. El Valladolid necesita sumar para alejarse de la zona baja: plan pragmático, área protegida y salidas rápidas. Si aguanta el primer golpe, el partido puede girar por detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Leganés - Huesca
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: CD Leganés buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: SD Huesca intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Zaragoza - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Romareda aprieta: el Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez, control emocional y eficacia en su área. El Sporting llega con ambición de zona media-alta y buscará ritmo por fuera y presencia en el área; si el Zaragoza compite rechaces y balón parado, puede sacar puntos clave.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Al-Nassr (SAR) – Gamba Osaka (J) (Finale)

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 1
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 8
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC 305: Du Plessis vs Adesanya

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation’s historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Unleashed - 1803 - Lightweight Title
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When Khabib Nurmagomedov retired from MMA, the UFC’s lightweight title was up for grabs. See the journey of the 155-pound belt following the Khabib Era on UFC Unleashed. Featuring Charles Oliveira, Dustin Poirier, Islam Makhachev, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 810 - UFC Connected 'Unbreakable: Zahabi Bros, Ultimate Access: Sharabutdin Magomedov, My Fight Week: Baisangur Susrkaev, Locked In: Joe Mazzulla, My Moment: Zhang Weili
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Inside Montreal’s iconic Tristar Gym, we explore how the Zahabi brothers forged an unbreakable bond, shaped by discipline, loyalty, and the love of combat.  We go behind the scenes to explore Shara Bullet Magomedov’s transition from the octagon to the silver screen in his upcoming role in a new film produced by music stars Hit-Boy and Alchemist

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - GROUP B - MALAYSIA vs INDIA - (TEAM)

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 1
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 8
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 317: Topuria vs Oliveira
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC International Fight Week 2025 concludes with a stacked card that features a highly anticipated bout between Brazilian superstar Charles Oliveira and undefeated former featherweight king Ilia Topuria for the vacant Lightweight crown. Plus Ajexandre Pantoja defends his flyweight belt against Kai Kara-France and much more on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.
